overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a female character walking through an urban residential area. The character navigates a sidewalk past a corner building, crosses near a passing black van, and continues down a wide tree-lined avenue with apartment buildings in the background.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a corner building, passing a green poster on the door

entered.detail: beige concrete building with large windows and a green poster on the door
door with green advertisement poster featuring red circular logo
green trees casting shadows on the sidewalk and building

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sidewalk beside a corner commercial building with a green poster on the door. Trees cast shadows across the concrete path as the character turns the corner and the building begins to recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza transitioning to avenue crossing

events.description: black SUV van drives from left to right across the character's path

agents.ego_description: walking across an open plaza area toward a wide avenue, approaching the path of traffic

notable_agents.action: black SUV van driving from left to right, passing in front of the character

entered.detail: large red-brown apartment buildings with multiple windows rising in the background
dark colored sport utility vehicle moving across the scene
sparse trees with green foliage dotting the open plaza area

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza with tall apartment buildings visible in the distance. The character walks across the open asphalt area as a black SUV van passes from left to right in front of them. Sparse trees dot the landscape as the character approaches a wide avenue.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide residential avenue with tree median

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of a wide tree-lined avenue between apartment blocks

entered.detail: single-story beige building with large storefront windows and striped awning
bare trees without leaves lining the left side of the avenue

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down the center of a wide residential avenue lined with trees and flanked by apartment buildings. The black van has passed out of view, and the character continues walking past a mix of leafy and leafless trees toward the distant city skyline. A low commercial building with a striped awning appears on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow urban sidewalk into a wide, tree-lined residential avenue. It begins beside a corner commercial building with a green poster on the door, moving past shadows cast by nearby trees as the character turns the corner. As the building recedes, the scene opens into a wide plaza where the character crosses an open asphalt area while a black SUV van passes from left to right. The camera then follows the character as they transition from the plaza onto a broad avenue flanked by tall apartment buildings and a mix of leafy and leafless trees. Finally, the view expands toward the distant city skyline, passing a low commercial building with a striped awning on the right.
